metadata.description: Loop & Gate Accountability Kit — a judgment layer for your own follow-through, with a deferral engine that catches the thing you keep avoiding.

plugins.name: loop-and-gate-accountability-kit
plugins.description: The eight gates of a daily accountability loop plus five ritual commands (morning, log, eod, plan-tomorrow, weekly-signals). Tracks deferrals, trips a pattern alert at three strikes, and scores your week honestly. Runs on Claude alone.
